name: Lambda timeout with downstream DB stall
raw_alert: ALERT: lm-lambda timeout after 10 minutes during reconciliation job execution. CloudWatch duration reached function timeout ceiling. Postgres lock waits increasing and queue backlog growing.
demo_goal: Show dependency-aware root cause reasoning and safe backlog mitigation guidance.

name: ECS repeated draining health-check failure
raw_alert: ALERT: ecs-fargate-01 tasks are draining every 10 seconds. Target group health is unhealthy and tasks are replaced before startup completes.
demo_goal: Show task-startup versus code-crash differentiation and health-check remediation.

name: Azure Functions broken Key Vault reference
raw_alert: ALERT: Azure Function app failing after deployment. Key Vault secret reference not resolving, managed identity access errors in startup logs, HTTP triggers returning 500.
demo_goal: Show Azure-specific configuration and identity troubleshooting.

name: AKS JWKS DNS or egress outage
raw_alert: ALERT: checkout-api pods failing token validation. Unable to fetch JWKS endpoint from AKS cluster, DNS resolution intermittent, outbound HTTPS egress suspected broken.
demo_goal: Show identity-provider dependency mapping and cluster egress reasoning.

name: AWS Lambda private VPC NAT egress loss
raw_alert: ALERT: auth-lambda in private VPC is timing out after subnet change. Cannot reach JWKS and partner API endpoints. NAT gateway or route table egress may be missing.
demo_goal: Show cloud-network root cause analysis for AWS serverless workloads.

name: Payment provider latency with customer impact
raw_alert: ALERT: payment-service latency above 15s on /charge. Checkout requests timing out and thread pools saturated. External payment provider suspected degraded.
demo_goal: Show blast radius communication and circuit-breaker style mitigations.
